title: First-line Pembrolizumab Plus Lenvatinib for Advanced Non-clear-cell Renal Cell Carcinoma: Updated Results from the Phase 2 KEYNOTE-B61 Trial.
abstract: Initial results from the KEYNOTE-B61 trial demonstrated that pembrolizumab combined with lenvatinib has promising antitumor activity in previously untreated advanced non-clear-cell renal cell carcinoma (nccRCC). We report updated efficacy and safety results after nearly 2 yr of follow-up.
